mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_water_quality ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM tb_water_quality WHERE measurement_point LIKE '%' + #{measurementPoint} + '%' ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_water_quality WHERE measurement_point LIKE '%' + #{measurementPoint} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_water_quality (measurement_date, measurement_point, ph, bod, cod, ss, t_n, t_p, manager, remark, reg_user, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{measurementDate}, #{measurementPoint}, #{ph}, #{bod}, #{cod}, #{ss}, #{tN}, #{tP}, #{manager}, #{remark}, #{regUser}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_water_quality SET measurement_date = #{measurementDate}, measurement_point = #{measurementPoint}, ph = #{ph}, bod = #{bod}, cod = #{cod}, ss = #{ss}, t_n = #{tN}, t_p = #{tP}, manager = #{manager}, remark = #{remark}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
